RC_CAPACITY_OVERLOAD.description: Capacity or congestion pressure: low throughput, high queueing, high utilization, and connection pressure.
RC_CAPACITY_OVERLOAD.augmentation: Boost utilization/queue/connection pressure and reduce throughput within operational bounds.

RC_TRANSPORT_DELAY.description: Transport/path delay: sustained latency increase with queue pressure and degraded MOS.
RC_TRANSPORT_DELAY.augmentation: Raise latency and queueing while keeping the signature distinct from pure jitter or packet loss.

RC_JITTER_INSTABILITY.description: Unstable delay variation: jitter spikes dominate the QoS failure.
RC_JITTER_INSTABILITY.augmentation: Raise jitter and jitter trend, with moderate latency impact.

RC_PACKET_LOSS.description: Packet loss path degradation: packet loss and BLER/retransmission pressure dominate.
RC_PACKET_LOSS.augmentation: Raise packet loss and retransmission pressure and reduce MOS/throughput.

RC_RETRANSMISSION.description: Transport retransmission pressure without necessarily severe packet loss.
RC_RETRANSMISSION.augmentation: Raise retransmission/BLER with low-to-moderate packet loss.

RC_RADIO_SIGNAL_WEAK.description: Weak radio/Wi-Fi signal: poor RSSI/RSRP and low signal-health scores.
RC_RADIO_SIGNAL_WEAK.augmentation: Push signal metrics into weak ranges and degrade throughput modestly.

RC_HANDOVER_INSTABILITY.description: Mobility/handover instability: repeated handovers, low handover success, and latency/jitter spikes.
RC_HANDOVER_INSTABILITY.augmentation: Synthesize handover events with low success rate and transient latency/jitter impact.

RC_CQI_MISMATCH.description: CQI/MCS/BLER mismatch: radio quality indicators conflict with selected modulation/coding behavior.
RC_CQI_MISMATCH.augmentation: Create inconsistent CQI/MCS/BLER patterns while keeping signal levels plausible.
